deeperExplanation: Python searches `sys.path` (current directory, PYTHONPATH, standard lib, site-packages) to locate modules.
internalImplementation: Loaded modules are cached in `sys.modules` dictionary.

performanceConsiderations.timeComplexity: First import O(N) file load; subsequent imports O(1) sys.modules cache lookup.

debuggingWalkthrough.bugDescription: Circular import error between two files.
debuggingWalkthrough.incorrectCode:
# a.py: import b
# b.py: import a
debuggingWalkthrough.correctCode: # Move shared import into function or third module
